name: GPT-1.8T-MoE
_comment: Approximation of NVIDIA's hypothetical GPT-1.8T MoE used in the 'Demystifying AI Inference' blog. Full architecture is not publicly disclosed; these are best-guess values. Total params: 120 * (2.25 * 20480^2 + 16 * 3 * 20480 * 14336) ~= 1.80T. FP4 weights (bytes_per_param=0.5). GQA 128:16. All layers MoE (16 experts, top-2). Vocab/seqlen match typical GPT-family conventions.
